Judge Pro Tem: Steven Derby, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Sojourn Properties, Inc. is present. Represented by David Saenz
Attorney Andrew Contopoulos for the plaintiff.
Defendants Lewis Davie and Benjamin Figueroa are present.
Attorney Brian Featherstun appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer in Dept.504A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Dec. 08, 2014 is vacated. (501/jpt)
